title: felicia dubia
intro: Felicia dubia, also known as Blue Felicia or Blue Flax, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Felicia dubia include reducing inflammation and pain, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Felicia dubia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
